---
title: "01_data_preparation_all"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
############################################################
# 0. Pakete laden
############################################################

library(tidyverse)
library(haven)     # für .dta files
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggeffects)
library(dplyr)

```

```{r}
############################################################
# 1. TRUSTWORTHINESS-RATINGS (Trust_1)
############################################################

# 1.1 Load Data
trust <- read_dta("Data/trustworthiness_rating/trustworthiness_rating.dta")

# 1.2 Filter: users of Facebook, Instagram, or Twitter
trust_fb_ig_tw <- trust %>%
  filter(grepl("(^1$|^1,|,1,|,1$)", social_media) |
         grepl("(^2$|^2,|,2,|,2$)", social_media) |
         grepl("(^3$|^3,|,3,|,3$)", social_media))

# 1.3 Data preparation
trust1 <- trust_fb_ig_tw %>%
  mutate(
    # Sharing outcome (0–1)
    sm = (rating_headlines - 1) / 5,

    # Define experimental condition
    nudge_type = case_when(
      fc_Rated   == 1 ~ "FactChecker_Rated",
      fc_Unrated == 1 ~ "Control",
      lp_Rated   == 1 ~ "Laypeople_Rated",
      lp_Unrated == 1 ~ "Control",
      trt        == 1 ~ "Control",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # The pre-exposure information does not induce an item-specific treatment effect;
    # therefore, unrated conditions are classified as control.
    condition_f = factor(
      nudge_type,
      levels = c(
        "Control",
        "FactChecker_Rated",
        "Laypeople_Rated"
      )
    ),

    real_f = factor(
      ifelse(dummy_true == 1, "Real", "Fake"),
      levels = c("Fake", "Real")
    ),

    sex_f = factor(
      ifelse(Gender == 1, "Mann", "Frau"),
      levels = c("Frau", "Mann")
    ),

    demrep_f = case_when(
      DemRep_C %in% 1:3 ~ "Democrat",
      DemRep_C %in% 4:6 ~ "Republican",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    # Unique ID (shift to avoid overlap across datasets)
    id          = ID + 3060,
    headline_id = factor(news_headlines)
  )

# 1.3 Variablen auswählen und CSV schreiben
vars_to_keep_trust <- c(
  "id", "Age", "sex_f", "condition_f",
  "demrep_f", "real_f", "headline_id", "sm"
)

df_trust_1 <- trust1[, vars_to_keep_trust]
df_trust_1$Experiment <- "Trust_1"

# 1.4 Save cleaned dataset
write.csv(
  df_trust_1,
  "C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_trust_11.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
############################################################
# 2. ACCURACY NUDGES (Accuracy_1)
############################################################

# 2.1 Load datasets
s3 <- readr::read_csv("Data/accuracy_nudge/Study_3_data.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    CRT3_1 = readr::parse_number(as.character(CRT3_1)),
    study = 3
  )

s4 <- readr::read_csv("Data/accuracy_nudge/Study_4_data.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    CRT3_1 = readr::parse_number(as.character(CRT3_1)),
    study = 4
  )

s5 <- readr::read_csv("Data/accuracy_nudge/Study_5_data.csv") %>%
  rename(
    Age = age,
    Sex = gender
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    CRT3_1 = readr::parse_number(as.character(CRT3_1)),
    DemRep = case_when(
      DemRep_C <= 3 ~ 1L,
      DemRep_C >= 4 ~ 2L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),
    study = 5
  )

# 2.2 Combine datasets
dat_raw_acc <- bind_rows(s3, s4, s5)

# 2.3 Apply filtering criteria
dat_acc <- dat_raw_acc %>%
  filter(
    
    !is.na(SocialMedia_Chk),
    FB == 1,
    !is.na(Condition),
    (study %in% c(3, 4) & Condition %in% c(1, 2)) |
      (study == 5 & Condition %in% c(1, 3))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    id = row_number()
  )


# 2.4 Reshape to long format
dat_long_acc <- dat_acc %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^(Fake|Real)[0-9]+_3$"),
    names_to = c("truth", "item_num"),
    names_pattern = "(Fake|Real)([0-9]+)_3",
    values_to = "sm_raw"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    item_num = as.integer(item_num),
    real     = if_else(truth == "Real", 1L, 0L),
    real_f   = factor(real,
                      levels = c(0, 1),
                      labels = c("Fake", "Real")),
    # Normalize sharing outcome
    sm       = (sm_raw - 1) / 5,
    Bsm      = round(sm),

    # Harmonize treatment across studies
    condition_harmonized = case_when(
      study %in% c(3, 4) & Condition == 1 ~ "Control",
      study %in% c(3, 4) & Condition == 2 ~ "Accuracy",
      study == 5 & Condition == 1 ~ "Control",
      study == 5 & Condition == 3 ~ "Accuracy",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    condition_f = factor(
      condition_harmonized,
      levels = c("Control", "Accuracy")
    ),

    demrep_f = factor(
      DemRep,
      levels = c(1, 2),
      labels = c("Democrat", "Republican")
    ),

    sex_f = factor(
      Sex,
      levels = c(1, 2),
      labels = c("Male", "Female")
    ),

    study_f = factor(study),
    Experiment  = paste0("accuracy", "_", study),
    # Item-ID: Study x Real/Fake x Item
    headline_id = interaction(study, truth, item_num, drop = TRUE)
  )


vars_to_keep_acc <- c(
  "id", "Age", "sex_f", "condition_f",
  "demrep_f", "real_f", "headline_id", "sm", "Experiment"
)

df_accuracy_1 <- dat_long_acc[, vars_to_keep_acc]
#df_accuracy_1$Experiment <- paste0("accuracy", study, "_", study),

# 2.5 Save cleaned dataset
write.csv(
  df_accuracy_1,
  "C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_accuracy_11.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
############################################################
# 3. FACTCHECK LABELS (fc_label)
############################################################

# 3.1 Load raw datasets from multiple platforms and studies
fc1 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/connect1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "connect1")

fc2 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/crmturk1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "crmturk1")

fc3 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/forthright1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "forthright1")

fc4 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/lucid1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "lucid1")

fc5 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/prolific1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "prolific1")

fc6 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/prolificnr1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "prolificnr1")

fc7 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/regmturk1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "regmturk1")

fc8 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/robbmturk1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "robbmturk1")

fc9 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/Exp1_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "LucidExp1")

fc10 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/Exp2_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "LucidExp2")

fc11 <- read.csv("Data/factcheck_label/Exp3_share_meta.csv", as.is = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(study = "MTurkExp3")

dat_raw_fc <- rbind(fc1, fc2, fc3, fc4, fc5, fc6, fc7, fc8, fc9, fc10, fc11)

# 3.2 Prepare data
df_fc_label <- dat_raw_fc %>%
  transmute(
    FM_ck = FM_ck,
    id          = as.character(ID),
    Age         = as.numeric(age),

    sex_f = case_when(
      female == 1 ~ "Female",
      female == 0 ~ "Male",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    condition_f = as.integer(hcondition),

    demrep_f = case_when(
      as.numeric(politics) <= 3 ~ "Democrat",
      as.numeric(politics) == 4 ~ "Independent",
      as.numeric(politics) >= 5 ~ "Republican",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    real_f = case_when(
      condition_f %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ "Fake",
      condition_f %in% c(4, 5)    ~ "Real",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    headline_id = as.character(itemID),
    sm          = as.numeric(share),

    Experiment  = paste0("fc_label_", study, "_", platform),
    
  
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex_f    = factor(sex_f),
    demrep_f = factor(
      demrep_f,
      levels = c("Democrat", "Independent", "Republican")
    )
  )
# 3.3 social-meida use filter as for the other studies
df_fc_label$SM_filter=ifelse(df_fc_label$FM_ck==TRUE | grepl("^1", df_fc_label$FM_ck) | grepl("^1$", df_fc_label$FM_ck) | grepl("2", df_fc_label$FM_ck) | grepl("4", df_fc_label$FM_ck) | grepl("999", df_fc_label$FM_ck),TRUE, FALSE)

table(df_fc_label$SM_filter)

df_fc_label1 <- df_fc_label %>% filter(SM_filter==T)

# 3.5 Save cleaned dataset
write.csv(
  df_fc_label1,
  "C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_fclabel_11.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
length(unique(df_fc_label1$id))
```




```{r}
############################################################
# 4. POOL ALL DATASETS
############################################################

# 4.1 Load prepared CSV files
df_accuracy <- read_csv("C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_accuracy_11.csv")
df_trust    <- read_csv("C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_trust_11.csv")
df_fc_label <- read_csv("C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_fclabel_11.csv")

# 4.2 Harmonize Variables
df_accuracy <- df_accuracy %>%
  mutate(
    headline_id = as.character(headline_id),
    id          = as.character(id)
  )

df_trust <- df_trust %>%
  mutate(
    headline_id = as.character(headline_id),
    id          = as.character(id)
  )

df_fc_label <- df_fc_label %>%
  mutate(
    headline_id = as.character(headline_id),
    id          = as.character(id)
  )

# 4.3 Experiment-specific Flags
df_accuracy <- df_accuracy %>%
  mutate(
    experiment_type = "accuracy",
    accuracy_nudge  = if_else(condition_f == "Accuracy", 1L, 0L),
    rating_shown    = 0L,
    rater_type      = NA_character_,
    label_shown     = 0L
  )

df_trust <- df_trust %>%
  mutate(
    experiment_type = "source_rating",
    accuracy_nudge  = 0L,
    rating_shown    = if_else(
      condition_f %in% c("FactChecker_Rated", "Laypeople_Rated"),
      1L, 0L
    ),
    rater_type = case_when(
      condition_f == "FactChecker_Rated" ~ "factchecker",
      condition_f == "Laypeople_Rated"   ~ "laypeople",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    label_shown     = 0L
  )

# Fact-check labels: only condition_f == 2 corresponds to "tagged false" (label visible)
df_fc_label <- df_fc_label %>%
  mutate(
    experiment_type = "factcheck_label",
    accuracy_nudge  = 0L,
    rating_shown    = 0L,
    rater_type      = NA_character_,
    condition_f     = as.character(condition_f),
    label_shown     = if_else(condition_f == "2", 1L, 0L)
  )

# 4.4 Pool data
df_all <- bind_rows(df_accuracy, df_trust, df_fc_label)

df_all <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    age        = as.numeric(Age),
    gender     = factor(sex_f),
    ideology   = factor(demrep_f, levels = c("Democrat","Independent", "Republican")),
    veracity   = if_else(real_f == "Real", "Real", "Fake"),
    veracity   = factor(veracity),
    study_id   = factor(Experiment),
    item_id    = factor(headline_id),
    participant_id = factor(id),
    share_intent   = sm
  ) %>%
  group_by(study_id) %>%
  mutate(
    share_z = as.numeric(scale(sm))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 4.5 Write Final CSV
write.csv(
  df_all,
  "C:/Users/Felix Clausen/OneDrive/Thesis/Analysis/df_all_pooled1.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
